testsuite.name: APITests.books.BooksSchemaValidation
testsuite.system-out:
Request URI: https://simple-books-api.click:443/api-clients Respuesta: {"accessToken":"129ef719a308c1f39f0413bb7b223417fa678eb9dc6a2aa553771ddf85502ad1"} HTTP/1.1 200 OK Content-Type: application/json Content-Length: 417 Connection: keep-alive Date: Thu, 26 Mar 2026 21:06:07 GMT X-Amzn-Trace-Id: Root=1-69c59fbf-3f5f4da63e636ef658de1125;Parent=6d115a3fef18eeee;Sampled=0;Lineage=1:9ee0f5ed:0 x-amzn-RequestId: 080a9269-4824-4333-a587-e1d6087370a4 Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * Access-Control-Allow-Headers: Content-Type, Authorization, X-Amz-Date, X-Api-Key, X-Amz-Security-Token x-amz-apigw-id: a2Xl-GeCIAMEubw= Access-Control-Allow-Methods: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, PATCH X-Cache: Miss from cloudfront Via: 1.1 f3945d74e32166b166de943713d94838.cloudfront.net (CloudFront) X-Amz-Cf-Pop: LIM50-P4 X-Amz-Cf-Id: cQQl1-V8GrnUIQ9ByXZG7PHbilA6uoR7Q3r-N4ipxGWqzYv2oNAMgA==
[ { "id": 1, "name": "The Russian", "type": "fiction", "available": true }, { "id": 3, "name": "The Vanishing Half", "type": "fiction", "available": true }, { "id": 4, "name": "The Midnight Library", "type": "fiction", "available": true }, { "id": 6, "name": "Viscount Who Loved Me", "type": "fiction", "available": true }, { "id": 2, "name": "Just as I Am", "type": "non-fiction", "available": false }, { "id": 5, "name": "Untamed", "type": "non-fiction", "available": true } ] Request URI: https://simple-books-api.click:443/api-clients Respuesta: {"accessToken":"1be22ba93144b3471adb58e330627ecaef0fe0db1db2e04ea9cfad8daf370817"} HTTP/1.1 200 OK Content-Type: application/json Content-Length: 417 Connection: keep-alive Date: Thu, 26 Mar 2026 21:06:17 GMT X-Amzn-Trace-Id: Root=1-69c59fc9-0b286874296ac8900ff682fd;Parent=38a4d149abfb6c1b;Sampled=0;Lineage=1:9ee0f5ed:0 x-amzn-RequestId: eb525068-34c8-470f-9e8d-aca4d3e7c0ff Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * Access-Control-Allow-Headers: Content-Type, Authorization, X-Amz-Date, X-Api-Key, X-Amz-Security-Token x-amz-apigw-id: a2XniFR-IAMERdA= Access-Control-Allow-Methods: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, PATCH X-Cache: Miss from cloudfront Via: 1.1 646918d972593b8541919a1f9825d242.cloudfront.net (CloudFront) X-Amz-Cf-Pop: LIM50-P4 X-Amz-Cf-Id: KRcd0SekQGXhxz48RR8WERX-XnaYLrQwmj8t_o1342frC2sNxOqaCg==
